params.message: if exist .env (echo .env already exists, skipping config) else (echo Creating .env... && uv run python -c "print()")

params.title: RP LLM (Roleplay Model)
params.description:
This is the creative model that generates roleplay responses.

KoboldCPP default: http://localhost:5001
Ollama default: http://localhost:11434

params.title: Logic LLM (State Extraction)
params.description:
A smaller model that extracts character state changes (location, knowledge, items...) from the RP response.

Ollama recommended with llama3, phi3, or gemma2.

params.title: Installation Complete!
params.description:
LangGraph ST Agent is installed.

SillyTavern setup:
1. Connect → OpenAI API
2. Proxy URL: http://localhost:8001
3. API Key: anything
4. Model: langgraph-agent

Click OK, then press Start.
